LIVERPOOL LGA

→NOTES
1. THIS DRAWING IS TO BE READ IN CONJUNCTION WITH RELEVANT ENDEAVOUR ENERGY'S STANDARDS AND THE NETWORK CONNECTION
POLICY.
2. ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CONTACT PHONE: 131081
3. CERTIFICATION SHALL LAPSE WHERE:
(i) NOTICE OF INTENT HAS NOT BEEN RECEIVED WITHIN SIX (6) MONTHS OF THIS CERTIFICATION, OR
(ii) CONSTRUCTION HAS BEEN INTERRUPTED FOR MORE THAN SIX (6) MONTHS.
WHERE DESIGN CERTIFICATION HAS LAPSED THE DESIGN MUST BE RESUBMITTED FOR CERTIFICATION BY THE ACCREDITED DESIGNER.
4. ATTENTION:
PERMANENT SURVEY MARKS MAY EXIST IN THIS AREA. THESE ARE TO BE LOCATED BY A SURVEYOR PRIOR TO COMMENCEMENT OF
WORK.
5. ATTENTION:
ALL SERVICES SEARCHES MUST BE CHECKED BEFORE CONSTRUCTION.
6. WARNING:
LIVE ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CABLES & OTHER SERVICES IN THIS AREA. PLEASE CONTACT DIAL BEFORE YOU DIG ON TELEPHONE: 1100
FOR SEARCHES TWO DAYS PRIOR TO EXCAVATION.
7. ATTENTION:
SERVICE PROVIDER TO NOTIFY ENDEAVOUR ENERGY'S ASSET DATA CUSTOMER DEPT. DAILY WHEN CABLE WORKS IS IN PROGRESS.
TELEPHONE 131081.
8. OPERATION LIMITATIONS
UNLESS APPROVED OTHERWISE, INTERRUPTION TO ANY CUSTOMER'S SUPPLY MUST BE AVOIDED. THE FOLLOWING ALTERNATIVES
SHOULD BE CONSIDERED:
-MOBILE GENERATORS & SUBSTATIONS
-LIVE LINE WORK
-DESIGN ALTERNATIVES
-LOW VOLTAGE PARALLELS
-WORK PRACTICES/STANDARDS
THE COST IS TO BE FUNDED BY THE CUSTOMER/DEVELOPER
9. REIMBURSEMENTS WILL BE PAID TO THE NOMINATED PARTY ON THE LETTER OF INTENT AFTER THE WORKS HAVE BEEN COMPETED AND
THE LETTER OF ACCEPTANCE HAS BEEN ISSUED. THE REIMBURSED AMOUNT IS SHOWN IN THE FUNDING ARRANGEMENTS FOR SCOPE
OF WORK. ANY DISAGREEMENT WITH THE AMOUNT SHOULD BE RESOLVED WITH ENDEAVOUR ENERGY PRIOR TO THE COMMENCEMENT
OF WORKS.
10. AN EARTH CONNECTION WARNING LABEL MUST BE INSTALLED WHERE EARTH CONDUCTOR OR AN EXTENDED EARTH GRID IS TO BE
CONNECTED TO LV STREET NEUTRAL TO ACHIEVE AN MEN SYSTEM AS PER EDI 0006. REFER TO DRAWING No.348245.
11. HAVE ALL THE EXISTING ASSETS BEEN FIELD CHECKED AND ARE ACCURATE AT THE TIME OF DESIGN? YES/NO
12. QUANTITIES AND DIMENSIONS GIVEN ON THIS DRAWING ARE BASED ON DESIGN INFORMATION AND SITE CONDITIONS AT THE TIME OF
DESIGN. AS THEY MIGHT CHANGE, THE BUILDER OF THIS PROJECT MUST CHECK ALL QUANTITIES AND DIMENSION ON SITE PRIOR TO
TENDERING AND PRIOR TO CONSTRUCTION.
13. ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT STANDARD EMS001 IS PART OF THE DESIGN.
NOTE:
- THIS PROJECT ASSUMES COMPLETION OF ARP4984.
ASP LEVEL 2 WORK WILL BE CARRIED AS PER NSW
INSTALLATION RULE AND SHOWN FOR INFORMATION ONLY
AND NOT PART OF THIS CERTIFICATION
ASP LEVEL 1/CONTRACTOR TO MAINTAIN MINIMUM EXISTING

OBTAINED BY THE DEVELOPER OF THE ROAD (AHIP). THE ASP
LEVEL 1 HAS THE RESPONSIBILITY OF LIAISING WITH THE
DEVELOPER TO ENSURE THAT THE CONDITIONS OF THE AHIP
ARE ADHERED TO AT ALL TIMES.

FAIRFIELD LGA

BOUNDARY

→NOTES
1. THIS DRAWING IS TO BE READ IN CONJUNCTION WITH RELEVANT ENDEAVOUR ENERGY'S STANDARDS AND THE NETWORK CONNECTION
POLICY.
2. ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CONTACT PHONE: 131081
3. CERTIFICATION SHALL LAPSE WHERE:
(i) NOTICE OF INTENT HAS NOT BEEN RECEIVED WITHIN SIX (6) MONTHS OF THIS CERTIFICATION, OR
(ii) CONSTRUCTION HAS BEEN INTERRUPTED FOR MORE THAN SIX (6) MONTHS.
WHERE DESIGN CERTIFICATION HAS LAPSED THE DESIGN MUST BE RESUBMITTED FOR CERTIFICATION BY THE ACCREDITED DESIGNER.
4. ATTENTION:
PERMANENT SURVEY MARKS MAY EXIST IN THIS AREA. THESE ARE TO BE LOCATED BY A SURVEYOR PRIOR TO COMMENCEMENT OF
WORK.
5. ATTENTION:
ALL SERVICES SEARCHES MUST BE CHECKED BEFORE CONSTRUCTION.
6. WARNING:
LIVE ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CABLES & OTHER SERVICES IN THIS AREA. PLEASE CONTACT DIAL BEFORE YOU DIG ON TELEPHONE: 1100
FOR SEARCHES TWO DAYS PRIOR TO EXCAVATION.
7. ATTENTION:
SERVICE PROVIDER TO NOTIFY ENDEAVOUR ENERGY'S ASSET DATA CUSTOMER DEPT. DAILY WHEN CABLE WORKS IS IN PROGRESS.
TELEPHONE 131081.
8. OPERATION LIMITATIONS
UNLESS APPROVED OTHERWISE, INTERRUPTION TO ANY CUSTOMER'S SUPPLY MUST BE AVOIDED. THE FOLLOWING ALTERNATIVES
SHOULD BE CONSIDERED:
-MOBILE GENERATORS & SUBSTATIONS
-LIVE LINE WORK
-DESIGN ALTERNATIVES
-LOW VOLTAGE PARALLELS
-WORK PRACTICES/STANDARDS
THE COST IS TO BE FUNDED BY THE CUSTOMER/DEVELOPER
9. REIMBURSEMENTS WILL BE PAID TO THE NOMINATED PARTY ON THE LETTER OF INTENT AFTER THE WORKS HAVE BEEN COMPETED AND
THE LETTER OF ACCEPTANCE HAS BEEN ISSUED. THE REIMBURSED AMOUNT IS SHOWN IN THE FUNDING ARRANGEMENTS FOR SCOPE
OF WORK. ANY DISAGREEMENT WITH THE AMOUNT SHOULD BE RESOLVED WITH ENDEAVOUR ENERGY PRIOR TO THE COMMENCEMENT
OF WORKS.
10. AN EARTH CONNECTION WARNING LABEL MUST BE INSTALLED WHERE EARTH CONDUCTOR OR AN EXTENDED EARTH GRID IS TO BE
CONNECTED TO LV STREET NEUTRAL TO ACHIEVE AN MEN SYSTEM AS PER EDI 0006. REFER TO DRAWING No.348245.
11. HAVE ALL THE EXISTING ASSETS BEEN FIELD CHECKED AND ARE ACCURATE AT THE TIME OF DESIGN? YES/NO
12. QUANTITIES AND DIMENSIONS GIVEN ON THIS DRAWING ARE BASED ON DESIGN INFORMATION AND SITE CONDITIONS AT THE TIME OF
DESIGN. AS THEY MIGHT CHANGE, THE BUILDER OF THIS PROJECT MUST CHECK ALL QUANTITIES AND DIMENSION ON SITE PRIOR TO
TENDERING AND PRIOR TO CONSTRUCTION.
13. ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT STANDARD EMS001 IS PART OF THE DESIGN.
NOTE:
- THIS PROJECT ASSUMES COMPLETION OF ARP4984.
ASP LEVEL 2 WORK WILL BE CARRIED AS PER NSW
INSTALLATION RULE AND SHOWN FOR INFORMATION ONLY
AND NOT PART OF THIS CERTIFICATION
ASP LEVEL 1/CONTRACTOR TO MAINTAIN MINIMUM EXISTING
STREET LIGHT LUX LEVEL DURING CONSTRUCTION
AN ABORIGINAL HERITAGE IMPACT PERMIT (AHIP) HAS BEEN
OBTAINED BY THE DEVELOPER OF THE ROAD (AHIP). THE ASP
LEVEL 1 HAS THE RESPONSIBILITY OF LIAISING WITH THE
DEVELOPER TO ENSURE THAT THE CONDITIONS OF THE AHIP
ARE ADHERED TO AT ALL TIMES.

(ii) CONSTRUCTION HAS BEEN INTERRUPTED FOR MORE THAN SIX (6) MONTHS.
WHERE DESIGN CERTIFICATION HAS LAPSED THE DESIGN MUST BE RESUBMITTED FOR CERTIFICATION BY THE ACCREDITED DESIGNER.

SPARE DUCT REQUIREMENT
1. IN AREAS WHERE ADDITIONAL DUCTS ARE REQUIRED THE SPARE DUCT IS INCLUDED IN THE PVC DUCT SCHEDULE & THE SECTION SHOWN.
2. SPARE SL DUCTS HAVE BEEN PROVIDED AND RESERVED FOR CLIENTS FUTURE USE.

NOTE
1. DUCT LENGTHS AND ARRANGEMENTS TO BE CONFIRMED ON SITE.
2. ALL TRENCH SECTIONS ARE TO BE READ & VIEWED FROM NODE TO NODE AS NOMINATED.
3. FOR ALL REQUIRED/SHOWN CROSSING DUCT WORK, REFER TO TYPICAL ARRANGEMENT INCLUDED ON THIS PAGE.

*THE EXISTING 125mm SPARE CONDUIT IS USED TO LAY THE EARTHING CABLE DUE TO THE ABSENCE OF SPARE 50MM DUCT. THIS ADJUSTMENT IS

sub-step-extract-all-notes.value:
1. THIS DRAWING IS TO BE READ IN CONJUNCTION WITH RELEVANT ENDEAVOUR ENERGY'S STANDARDS AND THE NETWORK CONNECTION POLICY.
2. ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CONTACT PHONE: 131081
3. CERTIFICATION SHALL LAPSE WHERE:
   (i) NOTICE OF INTENT HAS NOT BEEN RECEIVED WITHIN SIX (6) MONTHS OF THIS CERTIFICATION, OR
   (ii) CONSTRUCTION HAS BEEN INTERRUPTED FOR MORE THAN SIX (6) MONTHS.
   WHERE DESIGN CERTIFICATION HAS LAPSED THE DESIGN MUST BE RESUBMITTED FOR CERTIFICATION BY THE ACCREDITED DESIGNER.
4. ATTENTION:
   PERMANENT SURVEY MARKS MAY EXIST IN THIS AREA. THESE ARE TO BE LOCATED BY A SURVEYOR PRIOR TO COMMENCEMENT OF WORK.
5. ATTENTION:
   ALL SERVICES SEARCHES MUST BE CHECKED BEFORE CONSTRUCTION.
6. WARNING:
   LIVE ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CABLES & OTHER SERVICES IN THIS AREA. PLEASE CONTACT DIAL BEFORE YOU DIG ON TELEPHONE: 1100 FOR SEARCHES TWO DAYS PRIOR TO EXCAVATION.
7. ATTENTION:
   SERVICE PROVIDER TO NOTIFY ENDEAVOUR ENERGY'S ASSET DATA CUSTOMER DEPT. DAILY WHEN CABLE WORKS IS IN PROGRESS. TELEPHONE 131081.
8. OPERATION LIMITATIONS
   UNLESS APPROVED OTHERWISE, INTERRUPTION TO ANY CUSTOMER'S SUPPLY MUST BE AVOIDED. THE FOLLOWING ALTERNATIVES SHOULD BE CONSIDERED:
   -MOBILE GENERATORS & SUBSTATIONS
   -LIVE LINE WORK
   -DESIGN ALTERNATIVES
   -LOW VOLTAGE PARALLELS
   -WORK PRACTICES/STANDARDS
   THE COST IS TO BE FUNDED BY THE CUSTOMER/DEVELOPER
9. REIMBURSEMENTS WILL BE PAID TO THE NOMINATED PARTY ON THE LETTER OF INTENT AFTER THE WORKS HAVE BEEN COMPLETED AND THE LETTER OF ACCEPTANCE HAS BEEN ISSUED. THE REIMBURSED AMOUNT IS SHOWN IN THE FUNDING ARRANGEMENTS FOR SCOPE OF WORK. ANY DISAGREEMENT WITH THE AMOUNT SHOULD BE RESOLVED WITH ENDEAVOUR ENERGY PRIOR TO THE COMMENCEMENT OF WORKS.
10. AN EARTH CONNECTION WARNING LABEL MUST BE INSTALLED WHERE EARTH CONDUCTOR OR AN EXTENDED EARTH GRID IS TO BE CONNECTED TO LV STREET NEUTRAL TO ACHIEVE AN MEN SYSTEM AS PER EDI 0006. REFER TO DRAWING No.348245.
11. HAVE ALL THE EXISTING ASSETS BEEN FIELD CHECKED AND ARE ACCURATE AT THE TIME OF DESIGN? YES/NO
12. QUANTITIES AND DIMENSIONS GIVEN ON THIS DRAWING ARE BASED ON DESIGN INFORMATION AND SITE CONDITIONS AT THE TIME OF DESIGN. AS THEY MIGHT CHANGE, THE BUILDER OF THIS PROJECT MUST CHECK ALL QUANTITIES AND DIMENSION ON SITE PRIOR TO TENDERING AND PRIOR TO CONSTRUCTION.
13. ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT STANDARD EMS001 IS PART OF THE DESIGN.
NOTE:
- THIS PROJECT ASSUMES COMPLETION OF ARP4984.
  ASP LEVEL 2 WORK WILL BE CARRIED AS PER NSW INSTALLATION RULE AND SHOWN FOR INFORMATION ONLY AND NOT PART OF THIS CERTIFICATION
  ASP LEVEL 1/CONTRACTOR TO MAINTAIN MINIMUM EXISTING STREET LIGHT LUX LEVEL DURING CONSTRUCTION
  AN ABORIGINAL HERITAGE IMPACT PERMIT (AHIP) HAS BEEN OBTAINED BY THE DEVELOPER OF THE ROAD (AHIP). THE ASP LEVEL 1 HAS THE RESPONSIBILITY OF LIAISING WITH THE DEVELOPER TO ENSURE THAT THE CONDITIONS OF THE AHIP ARE ADHERED TO AT ALL TIMES.
